Formula: Sum of latest stakeholder VOMR value
Known Limitation: Nonfinancial value coefficients require normative calibration

Formula: Minimum or thresholded stakeholder value/mission outcome
Total output created / total resource used
Known Limitation: Equal coefficients in the current case make this metric uninformative until calibrated
Averages can conceal a harmed stakeholder
Sensitive to stakeholder grouping and target definitions

Formula: Jain index over stakeholder mission achievement
Known Limitation: High equality can coexist with uniformly poor outcomes
High acceptance may reflect coercion unless autonomy safeguards are also reported

Formula: Recommendations violating utility/intervention safeguard / changed recommendations
Data Requirement: Utility threshold intervention bound and recommendation log
Known Limitation: Safeguards are model assumptions pending stakeholder validation

Formula: Mean absolute recommended minus proposed intensity
Known Limitation: Absolute change does not capture every form of burden

Formula: Disrupted-step mission achievement / overall mission achievement
Known Limitation: Can exceed one and depends on scenario timing

Formula: Steps from shock until metric returns to prespecified band
Known Limitation: Undefined for no recovery or oscillatory behavior
Not implemented in the minimal engine at field fidelity

Data Requirement: Energy transport food and waste activity data
Known Limitation: Proxy depends strongly on system boundary and emission factors
